message.content:
@startuml
title Weekly Rewards to Vaults

actor "User" as User
actor "Ops" as Ops

participant "«mStable» Emissions Controller" as EmissionsController
participant "«mStable» Vaults" as Vaults
participant "«mStable» MTA" as MTA

User -> EmissionsController: setVoterDialWeights ([dial ids], [weights])
activate EmissionsController
note right of EmissionsController: proportions voting power across dials for future distributions
deactivate EmissionsController

EmissionsController --> User

== After Thursday 00:00 UTC ==

User -> EmissionsController: calculateRewards ()
activate EmissionsController
note right of EmissionsController: Calculates and stores rewards for each dial
deactivate EmissionsController

EmissionsController --> User

User -> EmissionsController: distributeRewards ([dial ids])
activate EmissionsController

loop [Dials]
  note left of EmissionsController: transfer MTA from Emissions Controller to Vault
  EmissionsController -> Vaults: transfer(vault, rewards)
  activate Vaults
  Vaults --> EmissionsController
  deactivate Vaults

  EmissionsController -> Vaults: notifyRewardAmount(rewards)
  activate Vaults
  note right of Vaults: Stream MTA to Users
  Vaults --> EmissionsController
  deactivate Vaults
endloop

EmissionsController --> User

== After rewards have accrued ==

User -> Vaults: claimRewards ()
activate Vaults
note right of Vaults: transfer MTA from Vault to User
Vaults -> MTA: transfer(user, rewards)
activate MTA
MTA --> Vaults
deactivate MTA
deactivate Vaults

User --> Ops

@enduml
